title: cyperus radians var. griffithii
intro: Cyperus radians var. griffithii, also known as the East Indian flatsedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antidiarrheal effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. Cyperus radians var. griffithii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and poultices, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
